array_types.name: Boot_Info_Array
array_types.code: type Boot_Info_Array is array (Unsigned_8 range <>) of Boot_Info_Type;

record_types.name: Boot_Info_Type

constants.name: Boot_Info
constants.code:
Boot_Info : constant Boot_Info_Array :=
  ( 1 => (Pages => 4, Start => 16#3F00#) ,
    2 => (Pages => 8, Start => 16#3E00#) ,
    3 => (Pages => 16, Start => 16#3C00#) ,
    4 => (Pages => 32, Start => 16#3800#) );
